title: AI Agents for Customer Service Input

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of tools/products to return across all sources.

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Minimum G2 or Capterra star rating (0–5). Results below this threshold are excluded.

channels.title: Supported Channels
channels.description: Filter results to products that support at least one of these channels.

integrations.title: Required Integrations
integrations.description: Filter results to products that integrate with at least one of these platforms.
